training.headline: The smartest training app you'll never have to pay for.
training.subline: While other apps charge €10/month, you get AI coaching, Athlete Score and real tracking — free.

features.title: Dashboard & Heatmap
features.subtitle: See your body load at a glance
features.description: Muscle heatmap, streak, weekly volume — everything on the home screen. You instantly see what was trained and what's still missing.

features.title: Stats & Athlete Score
features.subtitle: 0–1000. Five dimensions. One honest number.
features.description: Strength, consistency, volume, endurance, balance. The score shows you objectively where you really stand — not where you think you stand.

features.title: Coach Arved
features.subtitle: Not a chatbot. Arved.
features.description: He has access to all your training data — your PRs, your weak spots, your missed sessions. Responds like a human, thinks like a trainer.

features.title: Splits & Training Plans
features.subtitle: Arnold Split, PPL, Bro Split — or your own
features.description: Pre-built splits from beginner to pro. Or create your own. The system recognizes which workout is up today.

features.title: Community & Forum
features.subtitle: See live who's in the gym
features.description: Real community. See who's training right now, share workouts and create groups. Training is better together.

features.title: Start Training
features.subtitle: Empty workout or straight from your plan
features.description: Rest day checklist, quick start or directly the today's split workout. Plus: swap exercises when something is occupied.

comparison.headline: Why not just use another app?

cta.donationCopy: This app is built in my free time. Free. Always. If you want it to keep going:
